settings.heading: Travel-inspired meal kits with a premium but simple point of view
settings.text: ROAMSOME is a travel-inspired meal kit service bringing global cuisines to your home in a premium yet simple way.

settings.heading: Built for people who love the feeling of discovering something new
settings.text: ROAMSOME began with a simple idea: dinner at home can feel as exciting as travel when the ingredients, stories and flavours are chosen with care.

settings.title: Built for people who love the feeling of discovering something new
settings.text: ROAMSOME began with a simple idea: dinner at home can feel as exciting as travel when the ingredients, stories and flavours are chosen with care. We wanted to create a food subscription brand that feels polished and premium without becoming intimidating or overly complex.

settings.title: Make premium global cooking accessible for everyday UK homes
settings.text: Our mission is to help people cook with confidence, explore more cuisines and enjoy a flexible subscription that keeps pace with modern life. Every box is designed to reduce friction while increasing delight.

settings.title: Carefully considered from destination curation to doorstep delivery
settings.text: We obsess over the full experience: the quality of produce, the pace of the recipes, the visual presentation of every destination reveal and the ease of managing your subscription. The result is a weekly ritual that feels calm, premium and memorable.
